title: anthoxanthum pluriflorum var. intermedium
intro: Anthoxanthum pluriflorum var. intermedium, also known as intermediate sweet grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of using intermediate sweet grass include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as alleviating digestive issues and stress. This plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and health.
